title: Madizelle Mining Company 1917 Fred Smith
description: Fred J. Smith, in charge of the Madizelle mines, west of this city, which are preparing to resume at an early date, was a visitor yesterday on business. Weekly Journal Miner; March 14, 1917
author: Weekly Journal Miner
attribution_md:
Madizelle Mining Company 1917 Fred Smith
Fred J. Smith, in charge of the Madizelle mines, west of this city, which are preparing to resume at an early date, was a visitor yesterday on business. Weekly Journal Miner; March 14, 1917
